description: Adversary behavior frameworks — how attackers operate, organized into tactics, techniques, and procedures.
purpose: Reference attack patterns and adversary behavior. Includes MITRE ATT&CK (enterprise, mobile, ICS), MITRE ATLAS (AI/ML attacks), CAPEC (common attack patterns), and kill chain models.
notes: ATT&CK technique IDs use dots for sub-techniques (T1059.003), which SecID preserves exactly. ATLAS covers AI/ML-specific attack techniques. CAPEC provides common attack pattern enumerations.
